key.query: Elijah Craig Barrel Proof Batch C923 official

emittedEvidence.query: Elijah Craig Barrel Proof Batch C923 official
emittedEvidence.summary:
**Elijah Craig Barrel Proof Batch C923 — official confirmation**

The strongest official source is Heaven Hill’s Elijah Craig Barrel Proof product page, which lists **Batch C923** as the **September 2023** release at **133.0 proof**. That confirms the “133” on this bottle is **proof, not ABV**. ([heavenhilldistillery.com](https://heavenhilldistillery.com/elijah-craig-barrel-proof.php/js/vendor/videojs/images/js/vendor/pickadate/js/vendor/scrollmagic/minified/greensock/images/menu/greensock/videojs/videojs/scrollmagic/minified/hh-bottled-in-bond.php?utm_source=openai))

An independent non-retai
